name: Skills nav link navigates to the capabilities page with skill categories and tools
description: Clicking Skills in the sidebar navigation goes to /skills and shows capability categories plus a tools and technologies list.

planSteps.description: Click the 'Skills' link in the sidebar navigation
Verify the browser navigates to the /skills page showing a 'Capabilities' heading with skill category cards including 'Data Analysis & Market Research' and 'Data Visualization & Dashboards'
Verify a 'Tools & Technologies' section is visible listing Programming Languages including Python, R, JavaScript, and SQL
